name: runtime-module
description: Complete guide and code templates for creating runtime modules in not-ai-game-v2. Covers the two-file pattern (core class + adapter), Zod config schemas, event declarations, module state writing, widget integration (data binding, specialized components), Colyseus integration tests, and registration. Use when implementing any new game mechanic as a runtime module (e.g., scoring, timers, racing, capture-the-flag). Invoke with /runtime-module.
